name: Chocolate Peppermint Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom and part way up the sides of an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. Freeze the pan until firm.
3. Spread the soft peppermint ice cream over the frozen crumbs.
4. Cover with the chocolate fudge topping.
5. Freeze for several hours or overnight.
6. To serve, let the dessert stand at room temperature for about 15 minutes.
7. Cut into squares and serve.
